desc_query_knowledge_base: Query knowledge already added to the specified knowledge base based on user questions.
desc_query_local_docs: Query knowledge documents in the current robot workspace.
msg_confirm_remove_tool: Are you sure you want to remove this tool?
msg_confirm_remove_skill: Are you sure you want to delete this skill?
subtitle_add_skill: Provide services to users based on Skill capabilities. Multiple Skills can be added.
select_skill_tip: Please select the Skill to add. The robot will provide services to users based on the Skill capabilities. Each robot can add multiple Skills.
desc_agent_write_file: Allow the model to generate and write files. Enable with caution.
desc_agent_execute: Allow the model to execute scripts and commands. Enable with caution.
desc_agent_edit_file: Allow the model to edit local files. Enable with caution.
desc_goods_recommend: When a user shows intent to purchase or learn about a product, the agent summarizes the user's intent and queries the product catalog to provide recommendations.
empty_no_knowledge_base: No knowledge base is associated yet. Click "Associate Knowledge Base" below to add one.
empty_no_local_docs: No local documents yet. Click "Upload File" below to add one.
msg_confirm_delete_document: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
msg_invalid_name: The file name cannot be empty or be . / ..
